info.title: ATO Evidence Analysis Portal API
info.description: Published P-1 API contract. An endpoint appearing here does not mean it is implemented.

file.description: Single file, limited to 104,857,600 bytes (100 MiB).

artifact_kind.description: Domain artifact kind. P1.1 accepts every published enum value but only allows declared Content-Type application/json or text/plain; malware_scan_status and extraction_status remain pending until worker slices run (production extraction blocked while HS-005 is open).

Content-Disposition.description: Attachment with a server-generated ASCII ZIP filename.

Cache-Control.description: Prevents shared or local caching of sensitive export content.

servers.description: Application root outside the versioned API base path
Application root outside the versioned API base path

sessionCookie.name: __Host-ato_session
sessionCookie.description: Server-side OIDC session cookie. Production sets Secure, HttpOnly, and SameSite=Lax.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Required for contract-designated replay-safe operations. The server stores a normalized request digest with the original outcome for 24 hours from first successful completion. Reusing a key with the same normalized request returns the original outcome without repeating side effects. Reusing a key with a different digest returns HTTP 409 idempotency_key_conflict. After expiry the record may be deleted; key reuse is allowed only after row removal and does not affect immutable artifacts.

IfMatch.name: If-Match
IfMatch.description: Strong ETag for the current target representation. PackageRevision resources use the quoted form "v{revision_version}". Disposition mutations use the quoted decimal disposition version. A stale value returns HTTP 412 etag_mismatch; a missing required header returns HTTP 428 if_match_required. Weak tags and '*' are rejected.

CsrfToken.name: X-CSRF-Token
CsrfToken.description: Required on mutations together with server-side Origin validation.

ETag.description: Strong current resource version. PackageRevision ETags are the quoted form "v{revision_version}". Disposition ETags are the quoted decimal disposition version.

edited_value.description: Any JSON value. The server validates it against the canonical field schema selected by the proposal JSON Pointer, including that field's string and collection limits.

AcceptProposalRequest.description: Set edited_value to null to accept exactly; otherwise the proposal becomes edited.

path.description: Generated bundle path with no absolute or parent-directory segments.
